scientific_name.quote: American oyster, Abalone, and Pink oyster mushrooms
scientific_name.review_notes: Pleurotus spp. (americanus/ostreatus types) are the recommended DOA varieties.

temperature_c.quote: spawn run needs 24-27°C (American/Pink) or 24-30°C (Abalone), while fruiting requires 19-20°C or 21-27°C respectively
